transcript: What're you bothering me for? You don't even know me!
[scoffs] Yeah, I do! [beep] This is Les, seriously.
What do... What do I do for a living?
Huh? You know all about me, what do I do for a living?
What do you want me for?
What do you mean you couldn't get through?
'[looped]' There's your buzz again. There's your buzz again.
What's business is it of yours?
Oh. I don't even know who you are.
Les, yeah... '[beep]' You're Les, my friend, yeah.
Yeah, I-I... I sell sleds, right?
'[looped]' WHAT DO YOU WANT?! WHAT DO YOU WANT?!
'[looped]' [coughing] I told you, it's none of your god-- '[beep]' --damn business. '[looped]' Will you stop bothering me? Will you stop bothering me?
I'm not bothering you. This is Les, dude.
[coughing] I told you, it's none of your god-- '[beep]' --damn business. '[looped]' Will you stop bothering me? Will you stop bothering me?
I'm not bothering you. This is Les, dude.
